zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Marrow於1460年出生在英國米德萊可倫敦時，她的父親Sir William Marrow IV, Lord Mayor of London41歲，母親Lady Catherine Rich31歲。她於大約1475年與William Clopton在英國英格蘭米德萊可斯特普尼結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1496年在英國英格蘭素福爾可朗 梅爾福德享年36歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可朗 梅爾福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Marrow于1460年出生在英国米德萊可倫敦时，她的父亲Sir William Marrow IV, Lord Mayor of London41岁，母亲Lady Catherine Rich31岁。她于大约1475年与William Clopton在英国英格兰米德萊可斯特普尼结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1496年在英国英格兰素福爾可朗 梅爾福德享年36岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可朗 梅爾福德。

nameMeanings.name: Marrow
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English marwe, marowe ‘companion, mate’.

variants.name: Marra
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Antonio, Rocco, Carmine, Salvatore, Enrico, Pasquale, Sal, Vincenzo, Alessandro, Gaetano, Marino.
Italian (southern): habitational name from any of the places so called in central and southern Italy, from marra ‘heap of stones’.

Italian, Galician, and Portuguese: from marra ‘hoe’, in Galician and Portuguese also ‘big mallet for breaking stones’ (from Latin marra), presumably a metonymic occupational name for one who made such implements or for one who used them.

variants.name: Merrow
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Marrow  .
English: habitational name from Merrow in Surrey, apparently derived from Old English mearg ‘marrow, fat’, used figuratively to mean ‘fertile ground’.
Americanized form of French   Amirault   or of any of its altered forms. Compare   Meraw   and   Mero   4.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Marrow was born in 1460, in London, Middlesex, England, her father, Sir William Marrow IV, Lord Mayor of London, was 41 and her mother, Lady Catherine Rich, was 31. She married William Clopton about 1475, in Stepney, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1496, in Long Melford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 36, and was buried in Long Melford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Marrow est née en 1460, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Marrow IV, Lord Mayor of London, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Lady Catherine Rich, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé William Clopton environ 1475, à Stepney, Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1496, à Long Melford, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterrée à Long Melford, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat um 1475 in Stepney, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom William Clopton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1496 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Long Melford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Long Melford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Marrowが1460年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで生まれた時，父Sir William Marrow IV, Lord Mayor of Londonは41歳，母Lady Catherine Richは31歳であった。約1475年にイギリスイギリスミッドレセックスステプニーでWilliam Cloptonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1496年にイギリスイギリススフォルクロング メルフォードで36歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクロング メルフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Marrow(이)가 1460년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Marrow IV, Lord Mayor of London(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Catherine Rich(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 대략 1475년 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 스테p니에서 William Clopton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1496년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 론그 멜퍼드에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 론그 멜퍼드에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Marrow родилась в 1460 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Marrow IV, Lord Mayor of London было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Catherine Rich, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Clopton около 1475 г. в местности степни, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1496 г. в местности лонг мелфорд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 36 лет и была похоронена в местности лонг мелфорд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.
